# PointCalc

> PointCalc is an AI-powered tournament toolkit for BGMI, PUBG Mobile and Free Fire organizers. Upload lobby and result screenshots — the app extracts placements and kills with AI, then auto-generates the points table, warhead, top fraggers (MVP), slot list, team poster and certificates. Available on iOS and Android with 100K+ downloads.

## About

- **Name:** PointCalc (also "Pointcalc | Point Table Maker")
- **Platforms:** Android (Google Play), iOS (App Store)
- **Supported games:** BGMI, PUBG Mobile, Free Fire
- **Flagship feature:** AI screenshot extraction — placements and kills are read directly from lobby/result screens
- **Outputs generated:** Points table, warhead, top fraggers (MVP), slot list, team poster, tournament certificates
- **Founder:** Amal Manoj (public handle: xbeastop), Kerala, India — solo indie developer
- **Founded:** September 2021
- **Pricing:** Free tier available; Premium from ₹69/month; Premium + AI from ₹350/month (INR)
- **Ratings:** 4.9★ on App Store, 4.4★ on Google Play, 559+ total reviews

## Key pages

- [Home](https://pointcalc.in/): Product overview, hero demo, pricing, founder story
- [Features](https://pointcalc.in/features/): Full feature breakdown — AI extraction, points tables, top fraggers, slot lists, posters, certificates, custom point systems
- [Designs](https://pointcalc.in/designs/): Gallery of broadcast-grade templates (points tables, top fragger cards, team posters, certificates, slot lists)
- [FAQ](https://pointcalc.in/faq/): Supported games, AI accuracy, pricing, custom branding, offline use, founder background

## Use cases

PointCalc is built specifically for esports tournament/scrim organizers running custom BGMI, PUBG Mobile or Free Fire events. It replaces manual point calculation in spreadsheets and result-graphic editing in Photoshop. Common use cases:

- Daily scrim point tables published after every match
- Tournament finals — winner posters, top fragger of the day, MVP awards, certificates
- Slot list / lobby graphics for the start of a tournament day
- Bulk match processing for multi-day events (Premium + AI tier)
- Custom-branded designs for orgs and content creators
